windows.label: Human Written

windows.text:
Annual Briefings . Not later than one year after the submission of the report required by subsection (a), and annually thereafter until the date that is 5 years after the date of the enactment of this Act, the Secretary of the Treasury shall brief the committees specified in subsection (d) on the matters covered by the report for the one-year period preceding the briefing. 
 (c) Testimony Required . Upon request of either of the committees specified in subsection (d), the Under Secretary of the Treasury for Terrorism and Financial Crimes shall testify to explain the effects of this Act and the amendments made by this Act on North Korea’s access to illicit finance channels. 
 (d) Committees Specified . The committees specified in this subsection are - (1) the Committee on Financial Services of the House of Representatives; and 
 (2) the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs of the Senate.
